goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stansted airport' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 08:15' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from stansted airport and should go to cambridge
The train should leave after 08:15 and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get arrival time and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get phone number
